location: Purchased from Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold for 800 Runes, available as soon as you first reach the Hold.
tactics: No combat or unlock condition needed — it's in their base stock from the start.
A cheap, no-risk way to get a hammer-class weapon in the first hour of the game.
lore: A plain iron bludgeon studded with sharp points, built with guard-breaking in mind rather than elegance.

builds.name: Guard-Break Strength Starter
builds.why: High Guard Boost and stance damage from a cheap early purchase make it a solid early-game stagger stick for Strength builds.
